chapter_title.en: Chapter on Prohibition of Shedding Blood and Taking Wealth Unlawfully, the Prohibition of Engaging in the Impermissible, and Repentance From Killing Whether Intentional or Accidental

text: 5169 - وَ رَوَى اَلْقَاسِمُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ اَلْجَوْهَرِيُّ عَنْ كُلَيْبٍ اَلْأَسَدِيِّ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُقْتَلُ فِي شَهْرٍ حَرَامٍ مَا دِيَتُهُ فَقَالَ "دِيَةٌ وَ ثُلُثٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5169 - Al-Qasim ibn Muhammad Al-Jawhari narrated from Kulayb Al-Asadi, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who is killed during a sacred month - what is his blood money (diyyah)?
Imam (as) said: "It is full blood money plus one-third."
